oneSentenceTake: The latest trend in code RL environments is shifting from human-written data toward synthetic/verifier-driven RL environments, with open-source infra for agentic tasksets scaling fast.
superGrokProof: Used Browser Use with the saved X profile, opened SuperGrok on X.com, ran the code-RL query constrained to the last few days, and returned direct status URLs only for accounts and tweets.
